title: The Big Picture All About Handies
section_path: The Big Picture All About Handies
section_path_text: The Big Picture All About Handies
summary:
Main
By Nick Ristic
Despite accounting for a quarter of the dry bulk fleet, Handysizes rarely make the headlines. But relative to the larger ships, the segment has performed extremely well over the past couple of years. We look at the supply and demand drivers behind this trend.
